query: SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, CONSTRAINT_NAME FROM information_schema.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE WHERE REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME = 'dialogs' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
